info.title: MotoGT Backend API
info.description:
# MotoGT Complete Multi-Store Car Parts E-commerce API

This is the **COMPLETE** API documentation for the MotoGT platform - a comprehensive multi-store, multi-language car parts e-commerce system.

## Key Features
- 🏪 **Multi-Store Support**: Each store operates independently with its own products and orders
- 🌍 **Multi-Language**: Full internationalization support for product content *(languageId required)*
- 🚗 **Car Compatibility**: Advanced filtering system based on car models and compatibility
- 🛒 **Shopping Cart**: Store-specific cart management with session persistence
- 🚚 **Checkout System**: Complete order processing with address management and promo codes
- 🎯 **Promo Codes**: Discount system with validation (use "test123" for 50% discount)
- 🔧 **User Garage**: Personal car management for compatibility filtering
- ❤️ **Favourites System**: Personal product favourites management
- 📍 **Address Management**: Complete shipping/billing address system
- 🔐 **Secure Authentication**: JWT-based auth with role-based access control
- 📱 **Admin Panel**: Comprehensive admin tools for store and product management

## Authentication
Most endpoints require authentication via JWT Bearer tokens:
```
Authorization: Bearer <your-jwt-token>
```

## Language Support
⚠️ **Important**: Product endpoints require languageId parameter to return localized content.

## API Structure
- **Public APIs**: Product/category browsing (minimal auth required)
- **User APIs**: Cart, checkout, garage, favourites, addresses (requires user auth)
- **Admin APIs**: Product management, store administration (requires admin auth)
- **System APIs**: Health checks and API information

## Rate Limiting
API endpoints are rate-limited in production. See response headers for current limits.

get.description: Get paginated list of all cars in the database for compatibility filtering.
Get detailed information about a specific car.

Get all unique car models for a store, optionally filtered by brand.
        
**Features:**
- ✅ **Store-specific**: Returns models available in the specified store only
- ✅ **Brand filtering**: Optional brand parameter to filter models for specific manufacturer
- ✅ **No pagination**: Returns all models at once (optimized for dropdowns/selects)
- ✅ **Unique models**: Deduplicates model names from database
- ✅ **Fast performance**: Optimized query with proper indexing

**Use Cases:**
- Frontend dropdowns for car model selection
- Filter products by specific car models
- Build car selection wizards
- API integration for third-party services

**Examples:**
- Get all models: `GET /api/cars/models?store_id=19bf2cb6-1b50-4b95-80d6-9da6560588fc`
- Get BMW models only: `GET /api/cars/models?store_id=19bf2cb6-1b50-4b95-80d6-9da6560588fc&brand=BMW`
- Get Mercedes models: `GET /api/cars/models?store_id=19bf2cb6-1b50-4b95-80d6-9da6560588fc&brand=MERCEDES`

parameters.name: store_id
parameters.description: Store ID to get models for

parameters.name: brand
parameters.description: Optional: Filter models by car brand (case-sensitive)

get.description:
Get all unique car brands for a store.
        
**Features:**
- ✅ **Store-specific**: Returns brands available in the specified store only
- ✅ **No filtering**: Returns all brands (no brand parameter needed)
- ✅ **No pagination**: Returns all brands at once (optimized for dropdowns/selects)
- ✅ **Unique brands**: Deduplicates brand names from database
- ✅ **Fast performance**: Optimized query with proper indexing

**Use Cases:**
- Frontend dropdowns for car brand selection
- Filter products by specific car brands
- Build car selection wizards
- API integration for third-party services

**Examples:**
- Get all brands: `GET /api/cars/brands?store_id=19bf2cb6-1b50-4b95-80d6-9da6560588fc`

parameters.name: store_id
parameters.description: Store ID to get brands for

get.description:
Get products from the Exterior Parts category for home page display.

⚠️ **Critical Requirements:**
- storeId is **REQUIRED** - Products are store-specific
- languageId is **OPTIONAL** - Returns localized product content when provided

**🎯 Features:**
- Pre-filtered for exterior parts category (ID: 41d4ba95-90e9-477b-97b5-470a497d81b6)
- Supports pagination with page/limit parameters
- Stock filtering with inStock parameter
- User favorites included when authenticated
- Sorted by creation date (newest first)

**📊 Response:**
- Complete product information with images
- Localized translations
- Specifications by language
- User favorite status (if authenticated)
- Pagination metadata

parameters.name: inStock
parameters.description: Filter by stock availability (true = only products with stock > 0)

parameters.name: inStock
parameters.description: Filter by stock availability (true = only products with stock > 0)

get.description:
Get specific predefined subcategories for homepage display in exact order.

⚠️ **Critical Requirements:**
- storeId is **REQUIRED** - Subcategories are store-specific
- languageId is **OPTIONAL** - Returns localized subcategory content when provided

**🎯 Features:**
- Returns exactly 10 predefined subcategories in fixed order
- Includes both Exterior and Interior subcategories
- Parent category information included
- Sorted in predefined sequence for homepage consistency
- User favorites integration when authenticated

**📊 Predefined Subcategories (in order):**
1. Front Splitter (Exterior)
2. Vents (Exterior)  
3. Front Bumper (Exterior)
4. Spoiler (Exterior)
5. Diffuser (Exterior)
6. Steering Trim (Interior)
7. Rims (Exterior)
8. Control Trim (Interior)
9. Floor Mat (Interior)
10. Ladder (Exterior)

**📋 Response:**
- Complete subcategory information
- Parent category details
- Localized translations
- Fixed sort order for consistency

Get paginated list of product categories. 

**Required Parameters:**
- storeId: Filter categories by store
- languageId: Language for category translations

**Filtering by Product Type:**
You can filter categories by product type using either:
- productTypeId (UUID) - Recommended
- productType (code/slug) - Deprecated, use productTypeId instead

**Example:**
```
GET /api/categories/public?storeId=xxx&languageId=yyy&productTypeId=f2c4e0b1-5d3a-4f8e-9a7b-1c2d3e4f5a6b
```

parameters.name: storeId
parameters.description: ⚠️ REQUIRED: Store ID to filter categories

parameters.name: productType
parameters.description: DEPRECATED: Filter by product type code/slug. Use productTypeId instead.

Create a new product type with translations.

**Important:**
- Code must be unique and immutable (cannot be changed later)
- Slug is auto-generated from code if not provided
- At least one translation is required

example.error: Product type with code "car_accessories" already exists

Update an existing product type.

**Note:** Code and slug are immutable and cannot be changed.

delete.description:
Delete a product type.

**Warning:** This will fail if:
- Any products are using this product type
- Any categories are linked to this product type

400.description: Cannot delete product type in use

example.error: Cannot delete product type: 5 products and 3 categories are still using it

get.description:
Browse products with advanced filtering and search capabilities.

⚠️ **Critical Requirements:**
- storeId is **REQUIRED** - Products are store-specific
- languageId is **REQUIRED** - Returns localized product content

**🔍 Search & Filtering Options:**
- **Text Search**: Search in product titles/names only (focused search)
- **Price Filtering**: Set minPrice and maxPrice ranges with full support
- **Stock Filtering**: Filter by inStock status (true = only products with stock > 0)
- **Category Filtering**: Filter by single or multiple categories/sub-categories (comma-separated UUIDs)
- **Product IDs Filtering**: Get specific products by IDs (single UUID or comma-separated UUIDs)
- **Car Compatibility**: Advanced car-based filtering by brand, model, year, or user's garage

**🚗 Car-Based Filtering:**
- **carBrand/carModel/carYear**: Filter by specific car specifications
- **useMyPrimaryCar**: Use authenticated user's primary car (requires auth)
- **carCompatibility sorting**: Products exactly matching car specs appear first

**🎯 Combined Filtering:**
- **✅ NEW**: Search, price, and stock filters now work seamlessly WITH car filtering
- **Example**: Search "FLOOR MAT" + carBrand="BYD" + minPrice=30 + inStock=true
- **All combinations supported**: Mix any search/price/stock filters with car filters

**📊 Sorting Options:**
- **price**: High to low or low to high price sorting
- **name**: Alphabetical A-Z or Z-A sorting  
- **createdAt**: Newest or oldest first (default)
- **stockQuantity**: Most or least stock first

**✨ Response Features:**
- **in_favs**: Indicates if product is in user's favorites (requires authentication)
- **Localized Content**: Product names, descriptions, and specs in requested language
- **Correct Pagination**: Fixed total counts and page calculations
- **Real-time Stock**: Accurate inventory and availability status

**🔧 Example API Calls:**
```
# Search BMW products with price 25-100 JOD, sorted by price (high to low)
GET /api/products/public?storeId=19bf2cb6-1b50-4b95-80d6-9da6560588fc&languageId=3a59981f-5f2d-4b3e-a12a-2c2b25b4680b&search=BMW&minPrice=25&maxPrice=100&sortBy=price&sortOrder=desc

# Find in-stock products compatible with BMW 320i 2020 (by brand/model/year)
GET /api/products/public?storeId=19bf2cb6-1b50-4b95-80d6-9da6560588fc&languageId=3a59981f-5f2d-4b3e-a12a-2c2b25b4680b&carBrand=BMW&carModel=320i&carYear=2020&inStock=true

# ✅ NEW: Filter by specific car ID and year (uses product_car_compatibility table)
GET /api/products/public?storeId=19bf2cb6-1b50-4b95-80d6-9da6560588fc&languageId=3a59981f-5f2d-4b3e-a12a-2c2b25b4680b&carId=33d36d84-757c-45b9-acc6-863e3669b8c3&year=2022

# ✅ NEW: Filter by car ID only (all years)
GET /api/products/public?storeId=19bf2cb6-1b50-4b95-80d6-9da6560588fc&languageId=3a59981f-5f2d-4b3e-a12a-2c2b25b4680b&carId=33d36d84-757c-45b9-acc6-863e3669b8c3

# ✅ FIXED: Combined search + car filtering (search "FLOOR MAT" for BYD cars only)
GET /api/products/public?storeId=19bf2cb6-1b50-4b95-80d6-9da6560588fc&languageId=3a59981f-5f2d-4b3e-a12a-2c2b25b4680b&search=FLOOR%20MAT&carBrand=BYD&inStock=true&minPrice=30&sortBy=price&sortOrder=desc

# ✅ NEW: Multiple category filtering (comma-separated category IDs)
GET /api/products/public?storeId=19bf2cb6-1b50-4b95-80d6-9da6560588fc&languageId=3a59981f-5f2d-4b3e-a12a-2c2b25b4680b&categoryId=19bf2cb6-1b50-4b95-80d6-9da6560588fc,29bf2cb6-1b50-4b95-80d6-9da6560588fc&minPrice=20

# ✅ NEW: Get specific products by IDs (single or comma-separated product IDs)
GET /api/products/public?storeId=19bf2cb6-1b50-4b95-80d6-9da6560588fc&languageId=3a59981f-5f2d-4b3e-a12a-2c2b25b4680b&productIds=042da6e7-ce7e-4aa2-9858-dc7aa63c1cd4,58eceeb7-0c64-43a8-8cd2-92ee75827bd4

# Browse all products sorted A-Z by name
GET /api/products/public?storeId=19bf2cb6-1b50-4b95-80d6-9da6560588fc&languageId=3a59981f-5f2d-4b3e-a12a-2c2b25b4680b&sortBy=name&sortOrder=asc
```

parameters.name: categoryId
parameters.description: Filter by category. When provided alone, matches both category_id and sub_category_id. Supports single UUID or comma-separated UUIDs.

parameters.name: subCategoryId
parameters.description: Filter by sub-category. When present together with categoryId, restricts to sub_category_id only. Supports single UUID or comma-separated UUIDs.

parameters.name: minPrice
parameters.description: ✅ FIXED: Minimum price filter. Now works with all filters including car filtering

parameters.name: maxPrice
parameters.description: ✅ FIXED: Maximum price filter. Now works with all filters including car filtering

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: ✅ UPDATED: Text search in product titles/names only. Works with all filters including car filtering

parameters.name: productIds
parameters.description: ✅ NEW: Filter by specific product IDs (supports single UUID or comma-separated UUIDs for multiple products)

parameters.name: inStock
parameters.description: ✅ FIXED: Filter by stock availability. Now works with car filtering (true = only products with stock > 0)

parameters.name: carId
parameters.description: ✅ NEW: Filter by specific car UUID from product_car_compatibility table. Use with year parameter for year-specific filtering.

parameters.name: carBrand
parameters.description: Filter by car brand (alternative to carId)

parameters.name: carYear
parameters.description: ✅ NEW: Filter by car year. When used with carId, filters products compatible with that car in the specified year using year_from/year_to ranges from product_car_compatibility table.

parameters.name: useMyPrimaryCar
parameters.description: Filter by authenticated user primary car (requires auth)

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: ✅ UPDATED: Sort field - name (A-Z), price (High/Low), createdAt (Newest/Oldest), stockQuantity, carCompatibility (best fit first)

parameters.name: sortOrder
parameters.description: ✅ UPDATED: Sort direction - asc (Low to High, A-Z), desc (High to Low, Z-A)

get.description:
Get comprehensive product details including:
- **Localized Content**: Product names, descriptions, and specifications in requested language
- **Technical Specifications**: Detailed product specs with filtering capabilities  
- **✅ NEW Car Compatibility**: Complete list of compatible vehicles with year ranges (year_from to year_to) from product_car_compatibility table
- **Pricing & Stock**: Real-time pricing and availability
- **Images**: High-quality product images and gallery
- **Category Information**: Product categorization (categoryId, subCategoryId) plus full category/subCategory objects with translations
- **Favorites Status**: in_favs field indicates if product is in user's favorites (requires authentication)

⚠️ **Critical**: languageId is **REQUIRED** - Determines which language content to return

✨ **New**: `category` and `subCategory` fields now include full category details with translations, subcategories, and product counts
✨ **New**: `compatibleCars` array includes carId, carBrand, carModel, carYearFrom, and carYearTo for each compatible vehicle
Check if a product is in the authenticated user's favourites.

Admin endpoint to list all products with full details and management capabilities. languageId required for localized content. Category filtering matches both category and sub-category when only categoryId is provided.

parameters.name: storeId
parameters.description: ⚠️ REQUIRED: Store ID to filter products

parameters.name: categoryId
parameters.description: Filter by category. When provided alone, matches both category_id and sub_category_id. Supports single UUID or comma-separated UUIDs.

parameters.name: subCategoryId
parameters.description: Filter by sub-category. When present together with categoryId, restricts to sub_category_id only. Supports single UUID or comma-separated UUIDs.

patch.description: Admin endpoint to set/update a category's image URL (S3 URL expected).

post.description: Add a product to the cart. Supports both authenticated users (via Bearer token) and guest sessions (via x-guest-session cookie).

put.description: Update the quantity of a cart item. Supports both authenticated users (via Bearer token) and guest sessions (via x-guest-session cookie).

delete.description: Remove a product from the cart. Supports both authenticated users (via Bearer token) and guest sessions (via x-guest-session cookie).

get.description: Retrieve current cart contents. Supports both authenticated users (via Bearer token) and guest sessions (via x-guest-session cookie).

parameters.name: languageId
parameters.description: Language for product names in cart

delete.description: Clear all items from the cart. Supports both authenticated users (via Bearer token) and guest sessions (via x-guest-session cookie).

post.description:
Initialize user's cart with multiple products at once. This endpoint is designed for syncing local storage cart data when a user logs in.

**🎯 Key Features:**
- **Batch Processing**: Add multiple products in a single request (1-50 items)
- **Smart Merging**: Updates existing cart items or adds new ones as needed
- **Partial Success**: Continues processing even if some items fail validation
- **Detailed Feedback**: Returns which items were added/updated and which were skipped

**🔄 Use Case:**
When a user logs in, the frontend can sync their local storage cart with the database by sending all items at once.

**📊 Response Details:**
- `addedItems`: Successfully processed items with their final quantities
- `skippedItems`: Items that failed validation with specific error reasons
- `cartSummary`: Updated cart totals after processing

**⚡ Performance:**
- Optimized for batch processing
- Atomic operations per item (failures don't affect successful items)
- Efficient database transactions

200.description: Cart initialized successfully (may include partial failures)

get.description: Get the total count of items in the cart for UI badges.

post.description:
Validate a promo code and preview the discount before checkout. This endpoint allows frontend to show discount preview to users before they proceed with the order.

**Features:**
- ✅ **Public Endpoint**: No authentication required for validation
- ✅ **Real-time Validation**: Checks if code exists, is active, and within valid date range
- ✅ **Usage Limits**: Verifies if code hasn't exceeded usage limits
- ✅ **Minimum Order**: Validates minimum order subtotal requirements
- ✅ **Discount Preview**: Calculates and returns exact discount amount
- ✅ **Multiple Discount Types**: Supports both PERCENTAGE and FIXED discounts

**Validation Checks:**
1. Promo code exists in database
2. Code is currently active (isActive = true)
3. Current date is within valid range (startsAt/endsAt)
4. Order subtotal meets minimum requirement (if set)
5. Total usage limit not exceeded (if set)
6. Currency matches (for FIXED discount type)

**Response:**
- If valid: Returns promo code details and calculated discount
- If invalid: Returns validation errors with specific reasons

**Example Flow:**
1. User enters promo code "SUMMER50" in cart
2. Frontend calls this endpoint with code and cart subtotal
3. Backend validates and returns discount amount
4. Frontend displays discount to user
5. User proceeds to checkout with validated code

code.description: Promo code to validate (case-insensitive, will be converted to uppercase)

subtotal.description: Order subtotal amount (before tax and shipping)

userId.description: Optional user ID for future user-specific validation rules

validate_with_user.summary: Validate with user ID (for future user-specific rules)

200.description: Promo code validation result (both valid and invalid codes return 200 with validation status)

valid.description: Whether the promo code is valid and applicable

promoCode.description: Promo code details (only present if valid=true)

errors: Minimum order subtotal of 50.00 JOD not met

400.description: Invalid request body (missing required fields, invalid types, etc.)

post.description: 🔒 SECURITY: Convert cart items into an order. All amounts (tax, shipping, discount) are calculated ONLY on the backend. Use promo code "test123" for 50% discount on subtotal.

basic_checkout.summary: Basic checkout - Backend calculates all amounts automatically

checkout_with_promo.summary: Checkout with test123 promo code (50% discount)

value.notes: Applied 50% discount with test123 promo code

full_checkout.summary: Complete checkout with addresses, promo, and language

value.notes: Complete order with address and 50% promo discount

get.description: Get detailed information about a specific order.
Get paginated list of user's orders.

orders.description: Array of full order details with items, products, and addresses

post.description:
Create an order as a guest (non-authenticated) user. Requires a guest session (x-guest-session cookie).

**Key Differences from Authenticated Checkout:**
- No user account required
- Guest contact info (email, phone, name) must be provided in the request body
- Inline shipping/billing addresses instead of address IDs
- Guest orders can be looked up later via order number + email
- Guest orders can be claimed by creating an account with the same email

**Guest Session:**
The guest session is automatically created when adding items to cart without authentication.
The session is tracked via the `x-guest-session` cookie.

parameters.name: x-guest-session
parameters.description: Guest session ID (automatically set when adding to cart without auth)

guest_checkout_with_promo.summary: Guest checkout with promo code and billing address

get.description:
Look up a guest order by order number and email address. This is a public endpoint that allows guests to track their orders without creating an account.

**Security:** No authentication required, but both order number and email must match.

parameters.name: orderNumber
parameters.description: The order number received after checkout

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: The email address used during guest checkout

get.description: Get paginated list of cars in the user's garage. **storeId is REQUIRED** for store context.

get.description: Check the overall health status of the API and its dependencies.
Get basic information about the API including version and available endpoints.
Check the health status of the authentication service.
Retrieve a single product using its slug. Requires storeId and languageId for proper scoping and localization. Returns the same response shape as get product by ID.
Retrieve a single category using its slug. Requires storeId and languageId for proper scoping and localization.

post.description:
Add a car compatibility record to a product with year range support.

**✨ New Data Model:**
- Year ranges are now stored in `product_car_compatibility` table
- Each record has `year_from` and `year_to` (optional, NULL means "current")
- Same car can have multiple year ranges for a product
- Unique constraint: (product_id, car_id, year_from, COALESCE(year_to, 9999))

**Example Use Cases:**
- BMW 320i 2015-2020 → year_from: 2015, year_to: 2020
- Toyota Camry 2018-current → year_from: 2018, year_to: NULL
- Porsche 911 (all years) → year_from: 1900, year_to: NULL

409.description: Compatibility record already exists for this product/car/year range

get.description: Get all car compatibility records for a product, including year ranges.

put.description: Update year range for an existing product-car compatibility record.

delete.description: Remove a car compatibility record from a product.

get.description:
Get all cars compatible with a product, with optional year filtering.

This endpoint queries the `product_car_compatibility` table and returns cars
that match the compatibility criteria, including year range information.

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: Filter by specific year (checks year_from <= year <= year_to)

post.description: Admin marks order as delivered. For COD orders, automatically creates and completes payment record.

409.description: Order must be shipped before marking as delivered

post.description: Admin processes refund via PayTabs API. Supports full or partial refunds.

amount.description: Refund amount (optional, defaults to full order amount)

409.description: Refund not allowed for this order status

post.description: Admin cancels order at any stage. Releases stock and initiates refund if payment was completed.

isDefault.description: Whether this is the default language

models.description: Array of unique car model names sorted alphabetically

brand.description: Brand name when filtering by brand (only present when brand filter is applied)

total.description: Total number of unique models returned

correlationId.description: Unique request correlation ID for tracking

brands.description: Array of unique car brand names sorted alphabetically

total.description: Total number of unique brands returned

correlationId.description: Unique request correlation ID for tracking

ProductSpecsByKey.description: Map of specKey to SpecEntry for a specific language

slug.description: URL-safe identifier (optional, auto-generated from name if not provided)

ProductItem.description: Single product item as returned by public/admin product APIs

in_favs.description: Whether the product is in authenticated user's favorites

category.description: Full category details with translations (public endpoints only)

subCategory.description: Full subcategory details with translations (public endpoints only)

ProductsByCategoryResponse.description: Response for home page category-specific product listings

in_favs.description: Whether product is in user's favorites (requires authentication)

name.example: JETOUR T2 MATT BLACK HOOD VENT

description.example: Crafted from premium materials Lightweight and luxury, high quality, effectively reducing wind resistance, improving stability and endurance

total.description: Total number of products in the category

HomepageSubcategoriesResponse.description: Response for homepage subcategories in predefined order

data.description: Exactly 10 predefined subcategories in fixed order

InitCartRequest.description: Request to initialize cart with multiple products at once

items.description: Array of products to add to cart

productId.description: Product UUID to add to cart

quantity.description: Quantity of the product to add

InitCartResponse.description: Response from cart initialization with detailed results

addedItems.description: Items that were successfully added or updated

action.description: Whether the item was newly added or quantity was updated

skippedItems.description: Items that could not be processed due to validation errors

reason.description: Specific reason why the item was skipped

totalItems.description: Total quantity of all items in cart

uniqueProducts.description: Number of unique products in cart

message.description: Human-readable message about the initialization result

validateStock.description: 🔒 Controls stock validation during checkout. Set to false for pre-orders or special orders.

promoCodes.description: Array of promo codes to apply discounts. Use "test123" for 50% discount.

shippingMethod.description: Shipping method affects shipping cost calculation

CheckoutRequest.description: 🔒 SECURITY: Tax, shipping, and discount amounts are calculated ONLY on the backend. Frontend cannot override these values.

message.example: Some items are out of stock

GuestAddress.description: Inline address provided during guest checkout (not stored in user_addresses table)

billingAddress.description: Billing address (defaults to shipping address if not provided)

validateStock.description: Whether to validate stock availability. Set to false for pre-orders.

promoCodes.description: Promo codes to apply. Use "test123" for 50% discount.

GuestCheckoutRequest.description: Guest checkout request. Requires contact info and inline addresses instead of address IDs.

GuestOrderLookupResponse.description: Response for guest order lookup by order number and email

formattedAddress.example: 123 Main Street, Apt 4B, New York, United States 10001

OrderAddress.description: Shipping or billing address associated with an order

OrderDetails.description: Full order details with items, products, and addresses
